title: cydonia oblonga
intro: Cydonia oblonga, also known as the quince plant, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that produces fragrant white or pink flowers and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Cydonia oblonga include its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of consuming quince fruit include improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Quince fruit can be used to make jams, jellies, and herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are often used to aid in digestive health and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
